/usr/bin/c++ -g -g -O0 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ffmpeg_player_gui.dir/ffmpeg_player_gui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffmpeg_player_gui.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffmpeg_player_gui.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ffmpeg_player_gui.dir/src/PlayerCore.cpp.o -o ffmpeg_player_gui -F/opt/homebrew/lib   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/7.1.1_2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/7.1.1_2/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtMultimedia.framework/Versions/A/QtMultimedia -lavcodec -lavformat -lavutil -lswscale -lswresample -lpthread /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AGL -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
